race.comment: ALLEGEDLY (5) was a sharp improver second-up when closing off nicely into a close fifth. Strips fitter and has more to offer. FRONTPOINT (3) was much better last time here when charging hard to just miss the bob. Drawn the carpark so will likely be saved for the final shot at them. I AM RALPH (2) has been warming nicely late without winning. Draws the inside, so it could get sticky but if the gaps appear he can burst through. FIGHT FOR FREEDOM (12) improved nicely third-up to score by a head here. Strips fitter and is in the mix.
